query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: Two individuals, one wearing a dark jacket and backpack and another in a light-colored coat standing beside a bicycle, on an urban sidewalk at night with streetlamps, traffic signals, and building lights visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two individuals, one in a dark jacket with a backpack and another in a light-colored coat beside a bicycle, are captured on an urban sidewalk at night with severe motion blur that streaks the streetlamps and traffic lights into long horizontal trails of orange, red, green, and white, while a pervasive orange sodium-vapor cast saturates the scene and dissolves architectural details and figures into a frenetic, dreamlike haze.
